title: First trimester fatigue — what helped you?
body: I'm 9 weeks and can barely stay awake after lunch. Would love gentle tips that worked for you without extra guilt if I can't do them all.
author: tea_and_rest

replies.author: second_time_mom
replies.body: Protein snack + 10 min outside helped me more than any app reminder.

replies.author: anonymous
replies.body: My care team said small frequent meals — boring but it did help.

title: Anatomy scan nerves
body: Scan is tomorrow. Logically I know odds are good but my brain won't chill. Anyone else?
author: soft_waves

replies.author: calm_lily
replies.body: I brought headphones and a playlist — distraction in the waiting room helped.

title: Partner wants to 'fix' every feeling — how to explain I just need listening?
body: They mean well but jump to solutions. I want to feel heard without a bullet-point plan.
author: north_star
